assistantDesc.message: Sunshine browser's AI navigation assistant, powered by Mistral 7B (local Ollama or Mistral AI API).

promptSummarize.message: Summarize this page in a few sentences.

promptKeypoints.message: List the key points of this page.

promptTranslate.message: Translate the main content of this page into English.

promptExplain.message: Explain the content of this page simply, as if to a beginner.

usePageTitle.message: Attach the active tab's content to the question

inputPlaceholder.message: Ask about this page or the web…

greeting.message: Hi! I'm Sunshine Assistant (Mistral 7B). Ask me about the current page, select text then right-click → “Ask Sunshine Assistant”, or use the buttons above. Configure the backend in ⚙ (local Ollama by default).

errPage.message: Couldn't read the current page (internal or protected page) — answering without page context.

helpOllama.message: Check that Ollama is running (ollama serve) and the model is installed (ollama pull mistral:7b), or configure the Mistral API in ⚙.

helpMistral.message: Check your Mistral API key in ⚙.
